meta.title: Sell on Vergeo5 — free to list, pay only when you sell
meta.description: Join Zambia's marketplace for products, services, events, supplies, and directory listings. Free tier: 30 listings. Transparent commissions. Mobile-money payouts in minutes.

hero.headline: Free to list.
hero.subheadline: Reach buyers across Zambia with products, services, events, supplies, and your business profile — all from one vendor app.
hero.freeTierNote: Free tier includes up to 30 listings with full selling features.

products.title: Products
products.description: List on our canonical catalog — buyers compare prices across vendors.

services.title: Services
services.description: Offer beauty, catering, repairs, printing, and more with RFQ support.

events.title: Events
events.description: Sell tickets with dynamic QR check-in. Free RSVP events at 0% commission.

supplies.title: Supplies
supplies.description: Wholesale tier pricing for verified businesses (T2+).

directory.title: Directory
directory.description: Get discovered with your storefront, hours, and location on the map.

commission.heading: Transparent commissions
commission.intro: Rates are shown before you publish each listing. You only pay when you make a sale.
commission.footnote: Rates may be reviewed quarterly. Free events stay at 0% forever.

signup.title: Sign up in minutes
signup.description: Create your vendor account on mobile or desktop — no upfront fees.

kyc.title: Verify with T1 KYC
kyc.description: Upload your NRC and a selfie. We match your mobile-money name. Same-day approval.

list.title: List your first products
list.description: Attach to our catalog or quick-list. See your commission before you publish.

sell.title: Sell and get paid
sell.description: Orders flow to your dashboard. Escrow protects buyers; payouts hit your MoMo fast.

kyc.heading: Verification tiers
kyc.intro: No unverified listings go public. Start at T1 and upgrade as you grow.

t1.title: Same-day selling
t1.description: NRC photo + selfie + mobile-money name match. Up to 30 listings; first 5 orders capped at K500 each.

t2.title: Lift your caps
t2.description: PACRA certificate + company TPIN. Verified badge, supplies tab, and higher limits.

t3.title: Invited partners
t3.description: API access and banner placement eligibility for high-volume sellers.

preferred.title: Earned trust badge
preferred.description: ≥20 orders, ≥4.5★ rating, <2% disputes, <5% cancellations — reviewed monthly.

payout.heading: Fast mobile-money payouts
payout.promise: Paid out in minutes on mobile money — always within 48 hours.
payout.body: Buyer payments are held in escrow until delivery is confirmed (or auto-confirmed after 48 hours). Once released, MTN and Airtel payouts typically arrive in under five minutes. Bank transfers take 24–36 hours.

fees.question: Are there monthly fees?
fees.answer: No. Vergeo5 is free to list at launch. You pay a commission only when you sell. The free tier includes up to 30 listings.

payout.question: When do I get paid?
payout.answer: After escrow releases on delivery confirmation. Mobile-money payouts usually arrive in minutes; we guarantee payout within 48 hours.

whatCanISell.question: What can I sell?
whatCanISell.answer: Products, services, event tickets, wholesale supplies, and directory listings across our launch categories — groceries, beauty, fashion, electronics, home goods, and more. Prohibited items (used phones, alcohol, pharma, etc.) are blocked.

kyc.question: How long does verification take?
kyc.answer: T1 sellers with a valid NRC, selfie, and matching MoMo name are typically approved the same day. Nothing goes live until you pass KYC.

cta.heading: Ready to reach buyers across Zambia?
cta.body: Join hundreds of vendors building on Vergeo5. Set up your store in under ten minutes.

meta.title: Vendor onboarding — Vergeo5
meta.description: Complete your business profile and T1 KYC to start selling on Vergeo5.

business.heading: Business basics
business.intro: Tell buyers who you are. You can edit this later in your profile.

kyc.heading: T1 verification
kyc.intro: Upload your NRC and a selfie. We match your mobile-money name. Nothing goes public until approved.
kyc.nrcHelp: Capture the front of your National Registration Card in good light.
kyc.selfieHelp: Hold your phone at eye level. Face the camera directly.
kyc.legalNameHelp: Must match the name registered on your mobile-money number.
kyc.momoHelp: MTN or Airtel number registered in your name for payouts.
kyc.uploadFailed: Upload failed. Check your connection and try again.

quality.heading: Photo tips
quality.light: Use daylight or a bright room — avoid glare on the NRC.
quality.steady: Hold still; blurry photos are rejected.
quality.frame: Fill the frame — all four corners of the NRC visible.
quality.face: Remove hats and sunglasses for the selfie.

review.heading: Review and submit
review.intro: Check your details. After submission, our team reviews within one business day.
review.gateNotice: Your listings stay hidden until KYC is approved.

pending.title: Under review
pending.body: We are verifying your documents. You will get a WhatsApp update when done.

approved.title: You are verified
approved.body: T1 KYC approved. You can create listings — buyers will see them once you publish.

rejected.title: Verification needs changes
rejected.body: We could not approve your application.
rejected.gateNotice: Listings remain hidden until you pass verification.

resubmit.title: Resubmit documents
resubmit.body: Update the items below and resubmit — you do not need to start over.

t2.stubBody: PACRA certificate and company TPIN — coming soon.

errors.invalidPhone: Enter a valid Zambian mobile number
errors.loadFailed: Could not load your application. Pull to refresh.

images.heading: Photos
images.intro: {count} of {max} photos. The first is your cover.
images.compress_hint: Photos are resized before upload to save data.

meta.title: Create listing — Vergeo5 Vendor
meta.description: Attach to the catalog, submit a new product, or quick-list a commodity.

listings.title: Create listing
listings.intro: Choose how you want to list. Commission is shown before you publish.

commission.heading: Commission on this listing
commission.body: You only pay when you sell. Rate is fixed for this category.

attach.empty: No matching products. Try another name or submit a new product.
attach.hint: Search the Vergeo5 catalog to attach your offer.

newCanonical.heading: Submit new product
newCanonical.intro: We will review your product before it appears in the catalog.
newCanonical.moderationNotice: Your listing stays in draft until our team approves the product.

quickList.heading: Quick list
quickList.intro: For commodities without a catalog match — fresh produce, bulk goods, etc.

success.moderation: Submitted for review — we will notify you on WhatsApp.

errors.submitFailed: Could not create listing. Try again.
errors.product_not_active: This product cannot be attached yet
errors.invalid_tiers: Price tiers must rise in quantity and fall in unit price

meta.title: Import listings — Vergeo5 Vendor
meta.description: Bulk upload vendor listings from a CSV file with row-level validation feedback.

import.title: Import listings
import.intro: Upload a CSV to add or update many listings at once. Re-importing the same SKU updates the existing listing.

template.heading: Download template
template.body: Use our CSV template with example rows. Prices are in ngwee (integer). SKU is your unique code per listing.

results.accepted: {count, plural, one {# row accepted} other {# rows accepted}}
results.rejected: {count, plural, one {# row rejected} other {# rows rejected}}

errors.uploadFailed: Import failed. Check your file and try again.
errors.no_payload: Provide a CSV file or JSON rows

meta.title: Your listings — Vergeo5 Vendor
meta.description: View stock, pause listings, and edit prices.

manage.title: Your listings
manage.intro: Tap a listing to edit price, stock, and returns.

meta.title: Edit listing — Vergeo5 Vendor
meta.description: Update price, stock, condition, and return policy.

edit.title: Edit listing
edit.returnableHelp: Lane-2 return policy for this listing.
edit.pausedNotice: Listing paused because it has open orders.
edit.priceChangedNotice: Price updated — carts will be revalidated on next view.

delete.paused_instead: This listing has open orders and was paused instead of deleted.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load listings. Pull to refresh.
errors.saveFailed: Could not save changes. Try again.
errors.stockNotTracked: Stock adjustments apply only to tracked listings.
errors.stockQtyRequired: Enter a stock quantity for tracked listings.
errors.returnWindowRequired: Enter a return window when returns are enabled.

meta.title: Storefront profile — Vergeo5 Vendor
meta.description: Edit your public storefront: logo, description, hours, location, and shop URL.

profile.title: Storefront profile
profile.intro: This is what buyers see on your directory page. Complete your profile to rank higher.

fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell buyers what you sell and why they should choose you…
fields.descriptionHelp: Aim for at least 50 characters — it helps buyers trust your shop.
fields.locationHelp: Pin your shop on the map with GPS plus a nearby landmark buyers know.
fields.hoursHelp: Overnight hours are supported (e.g. close after midnight).

slug.onceWarning: You can only change your shop URL once. The old link will redirect automatically.
slug.locked: Your shop URL is locked after the one-time change.
slug.previous: Old URL {slug} redirects to your current shop page.

logo.help: Square images work best. Resized before upload to save data.

badge.hint: Earn the Preferred badge with great service — ≥20 orders, ≥4.5★, low disputes.

success.saved: Profile saved. Changes appear on your public page within a minute.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load your profile. Pull to refresh.
errors.saveFailed: Could not save your profile. Try again.
errors.authRequired: Sign in to edit your storefront profile.
errors.slug_locked: Your shop URL is already locked.
errors.slug_taken: That shop URL is already taken.
errors.slug_charset: Use only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
errors.hours_empty: Add at least one day of opening hours.
errors.hours_invalid: Check your opening and closing times.
errors.hours_invalid_day: One of the day names is invalid.
errors.hours_all_closed: Mark at least one day as open.
errors.location_required: Add your location before setting hours.

meta.title: Order detail — Vergeo5 Vendor
meta.description: View order items, payment context, timeline, and fulfilment actions.

actions.heading: Actions
actions.rejectPrompt: Tell the customer why you cannot fulfil this order.
actions.rejectPlaceholder: e.g. Out of stock — sorry for the inconvenience
actions.shipPrompt: Add tracking or courier details for the buyer.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load this order. Pull to refresh.
errors.forbidden: You can only manage your own orders.
errors.invalidTransition: That action is not available for this order.
errors.reasonRequired: A reason is required when rejecting.
errors.trackingRequired: A tracking note is required when shipping.

home.title: Today
home.offlineNotice: Showing saved data — connect to refresh.

needsAction.heading: Needs action
needsAction.empty: You're all caught up — no orders waiting on you.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load your dashboard. Pull to refresh.

meta.title: Order queue — Vergeo5 Vendor
meta.description: Filter and fulfil orders with one-tap actions.

queue.title: Orders
queue.intro: Tap an action to move orders forward. Pull down to refresh.
queue.offlineNotice: Offline — showing your last saved queue.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load orders. Pull to refresh.

meta.title: Payouts — Vergeo5 Vendor
meta.description: View escrow-held and released balances, payout history, and download monthly statements.

payouts.title: Payouts
payouts.intro: Balances come straight from the ledger — no separate bookkeeping.

balances.heading: Your balances
balances.ledgerNote: These figures match your ledger accounts exactly.

hold.noticeBody: After changing your mobile-money number, payouts are held for 24 hours while we verify the change. You will be notified when payouts resume.

statement.heading: Monthly statement
statement.pdfStub: PDF statements are coming soon — CSV is available now.

meta.title: Payout method — Vergeo5 Vendor
meta.description: Change the mobile-money number where your payouts are sent.

method.title: Payout method
method.intro: Enter the MTN, Airtel, or Zamtel number registered in your name. We re-verify via Lenco before saving.
method.otpHelp: We sent a code to your registered phone. Enter it to confirm this change.
method.success: Payout method updated. Payouts are paused for 24 hours.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load payouts. Pull to refresh.
errors.statementFailed: Could not download the statement. Try again.
errors.methodFailed: Could not update payout method. Try again.
errors.nameMismatch: That MoMo name does not match your verified legal name.
errors.kycRequired: Complete KYC before changing your payout method.
errors.payoutsPaused: Payouts are paused after a payout method change.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Try again shortly.
errors.methodChangeLimit: Too many payout method changes today. Try again tomorrow.

meta.title: Pickup scanner — Vergeo5 Vendor
meta.description: Scan customer pickup QR codes or enter PINs to mark orders as collected.

scan.title: Scan pickup
scan.intro: Scan the customer's QR or enter their order ID and PIN. Verification needs an internet connection.

offline.title: You're offline
offline.body: Pickup verification needs connectivity. Reconnect to verify QR codes or PINs.

camera.hint: Centre the pickup QR inside the frame
camera.deniedBody: Allow camera access in your browser settings, or enter the customer's PIN instead.

pin.heading: Enter pickup PIN
pin.intro: The customer received a 6-digit PIN on WhatsApp. Enter their order ID and PIN.

wrongQr.title: Not a pickup code
wrongQr.body: This looks like an event ticket or another QR — not an order pickup code. Ask the customer to open their order pickup QR from WhatsApp or the Vergeo5 app.

offline.title: Cannot verify offline
offline.body: Connect to the internet to verify pickup codes.

verifyFailed.title: Verification failed
verifyFailed.body: We could not verify this pickup. Check the code and try again.

invalidPin.title: Invalid PIN
invalidPin.body: The PIN does not match this order. Ask the customer to check their WhatsApp message.

alreadyClaimed.title: Already collected
alreadyClaimed.body: This pickup was already verified. If you think this is wrong, contact support.

staleToken.title: Code expired
staleToken.body: The customer may have a newer pickup code. Ask them to refresh their order page or WhatsApp message.

forbidden.title: Not your order
forbidden.body: This pickup belongs to another vendor. Only scan orders from your shop.

meta.title: Event scanner — Vergeo5 Vendor
meta.description: Scan attendee ticket QR codes to check them in, online or offline.

eventCheckIn.title: Scan tickets
eventCheckIn.intro: Sync before doors open so scans keep working without a connection.

sync.neverSynced: Not synced yet — connect and sync before doors open

offline.title: You're offline
offline.body: Scans are validated from your last sync and queued. They'll confirm automatically once you're back online.

camera.hint: Centre the ticket QR inside the frame
camera.deniedBody: Allow camera access in your browser settings to scan tickets.

count.checkedIn: {count, plural, one {# checked in} other {# checked in}}
count.pending: {count, plural, one {# pending sync} other {# pending sync}}

queued.title: Checked in (offline)
queued.body: Ticket {ticketId} queued — will confirm once you're back online.

rejected.title: Rejected
rejected.body: Ticket {ticketId} could not be checked in.

unknownTicket.title: Not recognised
unknownTicket.body: This ticket isn't in your synced list. Reconnect and sync, then try again.

staleWindow.title: Code expired
staleWindow.body: This QR code has expired. Ask the guest to refresh their ticket.

notSynced.title: Outside synced window
notSynced.body: This code is outside your synced check-in window. Re-sync closer to the event.

invalidSig.title: Invalid code
invalidSig.body: This QR code does not match a valid ticket.

invalidFormat.title: Not a ticket code
invalidFormat.body: This does not look like an event ticket QR.

errors.noInstances: This event has no sessions to check in
errors.unauthorized: Sign in as the event organiser to scan tickets

images.heading: Photos

fields.priceHelp: Enter amount in kwacha; stored as ngwee (no decimals in DB).
fields.qtyCapHelp: Max tickets of this type across all sales.
fields.perCustomerCapHelp: Max tickets one buyer can hold for this type.

returns.empty: No return requests waiting on you.

card.evidence: {count, plural, one {# photo attached} other {# photos attached}}

jobs.intro: Jobs broadcast to you — submit a quote before others expire.
jobs.authRequired: Sign in to view matched jobs.
jobs.empty: No open jobs match your services right now.

quoteForm.amountInvalid: Enter a valid price greater than zero.

quoteForm.validityInvalid: Validity must be between 1 and 30 days.
